## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, operational updates, and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New writer Rachel introduced to the Webstacks account, replacing Joe](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Focus on LLM content and thought leadership pieces for Webstacks' content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Operational improvements including new dashboards and upcoming Atlas system](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Need for deeper metrics and custom reporting on conversions and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Introductions

  - [Jakub recently returned from San Francisco on-site](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Jesse attended a Vercel conference, emphasizing the value of in-person events](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Rachel Pasche introduced as new writer for Webstacks account, bringing editorial expertise from Fortune, Men's Journal, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Devin, Webstacks' content marketer, recently left the team](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

### Content Strategy Shifts

  - [LLM content performing well, with clients finding Webstacks through platforms like Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Increased focus on thought leadership and executive insights](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Incorporating stakeholder interviews and market research into content](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Emphasis on Webstacks' unique perspective (e.g., "treating a website as a product, not a project")](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [New dashboard development for better analytics](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Upcoming Atlas system to replace Air Ops, offering expanded capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Creation of "artifacts" to streamline content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Potential integration of Gong calls for scalable content ideation and context](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

### Data and Reporting

  - [Access needed for HubSpot list shared by Jesse](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)
  - [Development of new client reporting with focus on attribution](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
  - [Need to align on important metrics for new Looker reporting dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2459.0)
  - [Exploration of lead quality tracking from content (organic vs. paid)](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)

### Content Ideation

  - [Focus on relationship between design and development, collaboration with internal devs and stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2257.0)
  - [Jesse to share Gong recordings for context on this topic](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [Team to develop blog ideas based on pillars and areas of emphasis (document to be shared by Jesse)](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to share Gong recordings for content ideation on design/dev collaboration topic](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [Jessalynn to develop blog topic ideas based on shared recordings](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
  - [Jesse to provide access to HubSpot list for the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
  - [Jakub to review previous calls and transcripts for metrics discussions](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2476.0)
  - [Team to continue developing new reporting dashboards and attribution tracking](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
  - [Jesse to share pillar document with areas of emphasis for content mapping](https://fathom.video/share/RrzyGUQUXTBWhZduycfFYNzr4Qk8RMcD?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
